name: Azure AKS Runtime Security — Coverage
description: MITRE ATT&CK techniques exercised by the runtime attack scenarios (k8s/attack-scenarios/) and detected by Falco / Defender for Containers, plus the admission techniques blocked by Kyverno. Import at https://mitre-attack.github.io/attack-navigator/.

techniques.comment: Deploy container: privileged/hostPath pod — blocked at admission by Kyverno
Terminal shell in container — Falco: Terminal Shell in Container
Read /etc/shadow, service account token — Falco: Read Sensitive File in Container
Reach Azure IMDS (169.254.169.254) — Falco: Contact Cloud Metadata Service
Container escape via host mount — Falco: Container Escape via Mount (CRITICAL); prevented by Kyverno disallow-host-path
Drop and execute new binary — Falco: Drop and Execute New Binary in Container
